tasks.title: Optimize LLMarkable Docling Integration
tasks.description: Comprehensive optimization of all LLMarkable pipelines to leverage latest Docling best practices and features. This task addresses critical gaps in chunking configuration, enrichment features, and serialization patterns to significantly improve document processing quality and consistency across all format pipelines.

subtasks.title: Core Chunking Optimization
subtasks.description: Update HybridChunker initialization across all pipelines with proper max_tokens configuration, explicit merge_peers setting, and custom ChunkingSerializerProvider for consistent output formatting. Fix tokenizer cache to handle max_tokens validation and improve chunk processing quality.

subtasks.title: PDF Pipeline Enhancement
subtasks.description: Enhance PDF pipeline with advanced Docling features: configure table cell matching (do_cell_matching=False) for better column separation, add enrichment options (picture_description, code_enrichment, formula_enrichment), implement flexible OCR language configuration, and optimize PdfPipelineOptions with latest features.

subtasks.title: HTML Pipeline Refactoring
subtasks.description: Replace custom paragraph-based chunking in HTML pipeline with proper Docling HybridChunker/HierarchicalChunker implementation. Remove inconsistent _chunk_document method, implement format-specific options available in Docling v2, and ensure consistent chunking behavior across all pipelines.

subtasks.title: Office Documents Optimization
subtasks.description: Optimize DOCX and PPTX pipelines with format-specific configuration options. Add proper WordFormatOption and PowerpointFormatOption configuration, improve converter initialization with format-specific settings, and optimize chunking parameters for structured document processing.

subtasks.title: Image Pipeline Enhancement
subtasks.description: Enhance Image pipeline with advanced OCR features: add picture classification capabilities, implement picture description support, improve OCR configuration with flexible language options, add confidence threshold configuration for OCR results, and integrate with modern Docling enrichment features.

subtasks.title: Configuration and Error Handling
subtasks.description: Update Config class with new Docling v2 parameters for enrichment features (picture_description, code_enrichment, formula_enrichment), implement better error handling for chunker initialization failures, add validation for tokenizer compatibility with chunkers, and improve pipeline configuration management.

subtasks.title: Output and Serialization
subtasks.description: Implement custom serializer providers for consistent table and image formatting. Add markdown parameter customization for image placeholders, ensure consistent metadata extraction across all pipelines, improve chunk metadata with enrichment information, and implement proper ChunkingSerializerProvider patterns following Docling best practices.

subtasks.title: Pre and Post Implementation Validation
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive validation: Pre-implementation - verify current Docling version compatibility, test existing pipeline outputs as baseline, document current chunking behavior for comparison. Post-implementation - compare chunking quality before/after optimization, verify all enrichment features work correctly, test edge cases and error conditions, validate performance hasn't degraded, update tests to cover new functionality.
